title: elatostema angulaticaule var. lasiocladum
intro: Elatostema angulaticaule var. lasiocladum is a plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae, commonly known as nettle family, and is native to certain regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Elatostema angulaticaule var. lasiocladum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
